title: Optimized + Craft Attack
description: Simple Mod Pack from Optimized + for Community Craft  Attack
body:
###### **Update for this modpack soon for the next Craft Attack Season** 

# Optimized + Craft Attack Edition
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b7519843e85e69ebb1418b03d4bf0b70307c3e9f.png)

This is a Fork from Optimized + and include some extra mods for Craft Attack Server.
Please note that this mods are main for Craft Attack Server not for Minigame Server. Some Mods are not allowed on Servers.


## Community Craft Attack Server

- SparkofPhönix
- Crystopia.net


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

*DM me on Discord then i can add you here!*

</details>
